---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new modeling, simulation, or dashboard improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
Describe the feature idea.

## Problem it solves
What limitation or pain point does it address?

## Proposed solution
Describe the change you want.

## Scope
Choose the main area affected:
- data ingestion
- feature engineering
- model training
- simulation
- dashboard
- deployment / CI

## Notes
Add references, mockups, or links if relevant.
